info.title: EasyCode Relay API
info.description: HTTP and WebSocket upgrade contract for the EasyCode relay.

get.summary: Return relay health and runtime metadata.

post.summary: Create a desktop pairing and one-time mobile claim code.
post.description: Requires the admin bearer token or x-easycode-relay-token header when the relay is configured with EASYCODE_RELAY_ADMIN_TOKEN.

delete.summary: Revoke an active pairing with either device pair token.

parameters.name: pairId
parameters.description: Pair id returned by createPairing or claimPairing.

post.summary: Claim a one-time pairing code from a mobile client.

parameters.name: pairingCode
parameters.description: Six-digit one-time pairing code displayed by the desktop agent.

404.description: Pairing code not found, expired, already claimed, or revoked

get.summary: Upgrade to the relay WebSocket for a paired desktop or mobile device.
get.description: Desktop clients should send the pair token as a bearer token or x-easycode-relay-token header. Browser mobile clients send the mobile token in the token query parameter because browser WebSocket APIs cannot set custom headers.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Mobile pair token for browser WebSocket clients.

parameters.name: afterSeq
parameters.description: Optional positive server sequence cursor for replay recovery.

101.description: WebSocket upgrade accepted. Messages are JSON RelayEnvelope objects.

AdminBearer.description: Admin token for pairing creation when configured.

AdminTokenHeader.name: x-easycode-relay-token
AdminTokenHeader.description: Admin token header alternative for pairing creation.

PairTokenHeader.name: x-easycode-relay-token
PairTokenHeader.description: Pair token header alternative for non-browser clients.

MobileTokenQuery.name: token
MobileTokenQuery.description: Mobile pair token for browser WebSocket clients.
